nodeTypes.name: page
nodeTypes.definition: Top-level page or screen container for a complete wireframe.

nodeTypes.name: header
nodeTypes.definition: Introductory page region for brand, navigation, and primary page-level actions.

nodeTypes.name: footer
nodeTypes.definition: Closing page region for secondary navigation, contact, legal, and support content.

nodeTypes.name: main
nodeTypes.definition: Primary page content landmark containing the decision flow.

nodeTypes.name: section
nodeTypes.definition: Reusable page region focused on one content purpose.

nodeTypes.name: hero
nodeTypes.definition: Primary page or section opener that orients the user and presents the main action.

nodeTypes.name: navigation
nodeTypes.definition: Set of links or controls for moving through primary or secondary destinations.

nodeTypes.name: breadcrumb
nodeTypes.definition: Hierarchical navigation trail showing the current page location.

nodeTypes.name: contentGroup
nodeTypes.definition: Logical grouping of related content and actions.

nodeTypes.name: textBlock
nodeTypes.definition: Group of related text content such as eyebrow, heading, body, and captions.

nodeTypes.name: heading
nodeTypes.definition: Section, component, or page heading text.

nodeTypes.name: paragraph
nodeTypes.definition: Body, helper, caption, metadata, or supporting copy.

nodeTypes.name: button
nodeTypes.definition: Single action control.

nodeTypes.name: buttonGroup
nodeTypes.definition: Group of related primary, secondary, or tertiary action controls.

nodeTypes.name: imagePlaceholder
nodeTypes.definition: Wireframe placeholder for still imagery.

nodeTypes.name: videoPlaceholder
nodeTypes.definition: Wireframe placeholder for video or motion media.

nodeTypes.name: card
nodeTypes.definition: Reusable content container for a single item, feature, product, or proof point.

nodeTypes.name: cardGrid
nodeTypes.definition: Grid or repeated set of cards.

nodeTypes.name: list
nodeTypes.definition: Linear collection of related items.

nodeTypes.name: table
nodeTypes.definition: Structured rows and columns for comparable data.

nodeTypes.name: comparisonTable
nodeTypes.definition: Table optimized for comparing options, plans, products, or features.

nodeTypes.name: accordion
nodeTypes.definition: Stack of expandable disclosure items.

nodeTypes.name: tabs
nodeTypes.definition: Mutually exclusive content panels selected by tab controls.

nodeTypes.name: form
nodeTypes.definition: Input workflow for collecting or submitting user information.

nodeTypes.name: inputGroup
nodeTypes.definition: Related form inputs, labels, helper text, and error placement.

nodeTypes.name: dialog
nodeTypes.definition: Blocking overlay for focused tasks or confirmations.

nodeTypes.name: drawer
nodeTypes.definition: Edge-attached overlay panel for navigation, carts, filters, or secondary workflows.

nodeTypes.name: popover
nodeTypes.definition: Lightweight contextual overlay anchored to another control.

nodeTypes.name: toast
nodeTypes.definition: Transient non-blocking feedback message.

nodeTypes.name: banner
nodeTypes.definition: Prominent inline or page-level message.

nodeTypes.name: stickyBar
nodeTypes.definition: Persistent sticky action or status bar.

nodeTypes.name: spacer
nodeTypes.definition: Structural spacing marker used only when spacing affects layout semantics.

nodeTypes.name: divider
nodeTypes.definition: Structural separator between content groups.

nodeTypes.name: annotation
nodeTypes.definition: Non-rendered implementation or review note attached to a wireframe node.
